standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per anchor-qualified summary target

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patient-level identifier used to search future hospitalizations
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: hospital-admission-level identifier and target retained key

database_mapping.source_grain: one row per hospital admission in hosp_admissions
database_mapping.target_grain: one row per standardized hospital-admission encounter with a nullable observed future-admission duration

summary_build_translation.window_start_translation: start at hosp_admissions.dischtime for the current hospital admission
summary_build_translation.window_end_translation: end at the admittime of the first later different hospitalization observed for the same subject_id
summary_build_translation.qualifying_row_translation: every hosp_admissions row with subject_id, hadm_id, and dischtime is a candidate retained encounter row
summary_build_translation.selection_translation: sort admissions by subject_id, admittime, and hadm_id; for each current admission, select the first later row for the same subject with a different hadm_id and admittime strictly greater than current dischtime
summary_build_translation.aggregation_translation: compute (next_later_admittime - current_dischtime) in days and round half away from zero to 3 decimal places
summary_build_translation.tie_break_translation: after enforcing strict post-discharge timing, use stable ordering by admittime then hadm_id for candidate future admissions
summary_build_translation.no_source_row_translation: do not synthesize admissions outside hosp_admissions; retain the source admission row with null duration when no later different hospitalization is observed
summary_build_translation.partial_window_translation: missing current dischtime is a contract failure for this MIMIC mapping; missing future admission means the retained value is null, not zero

validation_contract.no_source_row_policy_check: hospital admissions are the target source rows; no additional null target rows are synthesized outside hosp_admissions
validation_contract.window_consistency_action: exclude same-time, overlapping, self-match, or nonpositive-gap candidates from the retained next-hospitalization match
notes: The retained target grain is hospital admission encounter, not ICU stay.
The retained duration is computed from current hosp_admissions.dischtime to the first later different hosp_admissions.admittime for the same subject.
The retained value may be null; null means no later different hospitalization was observed in the captured MIMIC source.
This variable is not std_hospital_readmission_30d and does not encode a binary readmission outcome.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint reads this mapping spec and delegates to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_days_to_next_hospital_admission outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
